title: Ultimate AI Sales Page Writer — intake contract (fleet-clean)
description: The 12-field intake contract recovered from the 'All In One Sales Page Assets' engine (ANALYSIS §3), with the brittle field keys carrying literal embedded spaces REPAIRED to sane keys. NOTE O-3: the two legacy GHL keys with embedded spaces ('Sales_Page_Writer_Product _Info', 'upsellOneProductDescription ') must be renamed on the GHL side and the consumer side TOGETHER at cutover; the sane keys below are the target. The prover reads either this spec (a 'fields' contract) OR a runtime brief (an 'answers' object, provenance-gated + locked).

fields.asks: Front-end (main) product/offer description incl. price + CTA link.
How many AI images to generate. Default RAISED to 12 so every stage slice is non-empty (ANALYSIS §7.4; PRD O-6).

derived_runtime.client_slug: kebab slug from the GHL location/contact (RUNTIME ONLY — never in repo).
derived_runtime.funnel_slug: kebab slug from the offer title.
derived_runtime.offer_token_ledger: the exact offer name(s) from product_info/upsell/downsell/high-ticket — the provenance seed the bundle + delivery gates depend on.
derived_runtime.founder_name: first_name + last_name — SEO founder-name that Skill 6 validate_founder_name requires.

image_slice_map.note: How image_prompt_count allocates across stages (fixed for count>=12; proportional otherwise, prover-checked).

provider_rule: CLIENT runtime uses the client's OWN configured providers/keys for text + images — NEVER Anthropic, NEVER the operator's accounts. A/B variants come from two client models OR two persona prompts on one client model (never an Anthropic/Gemini split as in the legacy engine).

runtime_brief_contract.answers: an object keyed by the sane field keys above
runtime_brief_contract.offer_token_ledger: non-empty list of the declared offer name(s)
